title: Ayos na... ang kasunod
overview: The story of two people leading two different lives. Ramon is a delivery truck driver while Amor owns a neighborhood kitchenette. He is looking for the perfect partner. Her seven goon-like brothers are guarding her. When they meet, it's love at first sight.

trailers.title: Hoy! Mga PANGET! Baka Nalimutan nyong Teritoryo ko to! | Ayos na ang Kasunod | Fernando Poe Jr.
